title: UVTools Multi-Firmware Web Tool
subtitle: Multi-firmware flasher and calibration manager via Web Serial API
profileHelpAuto: Select a radio family or load firmware to auto-detect it.
profileHelpV3: Use this page for UV-K1 Series and UV-K5 Version 3 firmware.
profileHelpLegacy: Use this page for UV-K5/K6 legacy firmware. The compatible legacy protocol runs here directly.
engineBadgeNativeTooltip: Flashing stays on this page using the modern UVTools engine.
engineBadgeLegacyTooltip: Flashing stays on this page using the compatible legacy protocol.
infoBox: Note: This application requires Chrome/Edge/Opera. Make sure your radio is in DFU mode (flash mode) before flash.
infoBoxLegacy: Note: Legacy profiles flash on this page using the compatible legacy protocol. Put the radio in flash mode before continuing.
legacyFirmwareInvalid: Legacy firmware CRC check failed. Please choose a valid flashable .bin file.
legacyFirmwareTooLarge: Legacy firmware is too large for the target radio.
legacyPacketTimeout: No response received from the radio in flash mode.
legacyNoData: No data received from the radio in flash mode.
legacyWrongPacket: Unexpected packet received. Confirm the radio is in flash mode.
legacyRadioReady: Radio in legacy flash mode detected.
legacyVersionCheckFailed: Legacy firmware version does not match the connected radio.
infoBoxDump: Note: This application requires Chrome/Edge/Opera. Make sure your radio is in normal mode before dump or restore.
dumpDescription: Extract calibration data from your radio. The connected radio is auto-detected.
autoDetectLegacy: Auto-detected legacy firmware format. Selected profile: {0}
autoDetectNative: Auto-detected modern firmware format. Selected profile: {0}
calibInvalidSize: Invalid calibration file size. Expected 512 bytes, got {0} bytes
blWarning: ⚠️ WARNING: BL version mismatch! Expected: {0}, Got: {1}
waitingStop: Waiting for DEV_INFO messages to stop...
dumpFullStarted: Reading full EEPROM (64 KB)... this may take a minute.
webSerialNotSupported: ⚠️ Web Serial API not supported. Use Chrome/Edge/Opera.
